content.en:
After coming here, Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang were very low-key.

And at this time, Ye Tiancai really sighed for the first time the strength of the Auga Kingdom.

A force like Luoxia Pavilion is inconspicuous in the Auga Country, and even the Tempest Chamber of Commerce is only a medium force in the Auga Country.

The number one force in the Agu Kingdom is naturally the Lord of the Agu Kingdom, and the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm under his command has three digits.

The second is those top forces in the Ancient Realm, and there are at least double-digit Eternal Dao Realms.

It is conceivable how many eternal realms there are in the Ancient Realm.

......

After entering the capital of Oko.

Ye Tian began to take out a high-level Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item that he had synthesized during this time, this was his acquisition of a batch of high-level first-order Supreme Dao Rule items, and then used the Eternal Rule Disk to synthesize it.

Although the side effects are great, they can still be removed.

Therefore, such an Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item is of high value, and there will definitely be many Eternal Supreme Dao powerhouses who will bid for it.

Subsequently.

He came to the auction house and sent this Eternal Sequence Dao Rule item for auction.

After some time, the auction is about to begin.

Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang entered the auction hall, this auction hall was very large, enough to accommodate 100,000 people, and every Eternal Dao powerhouse who entered here could have a void seat, and the seat had a supply of various heaven and earth spirit fruits with exquisite taste.

Ye Tian and Luo Wushuang sat on the two void seats close to each other.

And around the venue, there are also void palaces, these palaces are protected by dense formations, even the will of the Eternal Dao Realm cannot penetrate it, and the strong people who can sit there and bid are definitely the powerhouses in the Eternal Dao Realm.

Ordinary Eternal Dao Realm are not qualified to enter.

Soon, the place was filled with Eternal Daoist powerhouses.

"One hundred thousand Eternal Daoist powerhouses, this is just an ancient realm!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

In addition to the ancient realm, there seem to be other realms, and it is conceivable how many eternal Daoist powerhouses there are in this piece of heaven and earth, while there are only a few Eternal Daoist powerhouses in the Void Domain.

It's not just a matter of resources, it's more of a matter of inheritance.

There is not even an Eternal Dao Secret Technique in the Void Domain, but there are many here, and small forces like Luoxia Pavilion all have Luoxia Light.

The inheritance aspect alone is far beyond the Void Domain.

Soon.

The auction has begun!

Airplanes!

An Eternal Dao Realm personally appeared and presided over this auction, which shows the intensity of this auction.

"The first auction item, the medium mythical spirit artifact Ten Thousand Souls Golden Grass, the starting price is 60,000 ancient coins!"

When the middle-class mythical spirit creature Ten Thousand Souls Golden Grass appeared, Ye Tian was also quite surprised.

Because the quality of this mythical spirit object is also quite good, it can be ranked at least among the top twenty among the mythical spirit objects in the Myth Valley, but in such an auction, it is the first auction.

"It seems that the items that can be sent for auction at such an auction are all good things, and ordinary treasures can't be put on the table at all. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Many Eternal Daoist powerhouses are still very interested in the Ten Thousand Souls Golden Grass and have participated in the auction.

In the end, a powerhouse in the late stage of Eternal Daohua won the auction at the price of 160,000 ancient coins.

Soon, a second lot was presented.

The auctioneer said: "The second auction item, the Innate Primordial Treasure Immortal Stone, can save an Eternal Dao powerhouse from being resurrected once, it is useless to the Eternal Dao Realm, and it cannot be resurrected if it is killed by the Eternal Dao Realm, and the starting price is 100,000 ancient coins!"

Resurrected treasures are of high value!

Although he was killed by the Eternal Dao Realm, he could not use this innate primordial treasure to resurrect, but if he was killed by the Eternal Dao powerhouse, he could be resurrected once.

Under normal circumstances, many Eternal Dao powerhouses would not offend the Eternal Dao Realm, at most they would offend the Eternal Dao powerhouses of the same level.

Therefore, this innate primordial treasure is equivalent to one more life!

Thereupon.

A large number of Eternal Daoist powerhouses are bidding wildly.

Ye Tian didn't participate in the auction, this kind of innate primordial treasure was chicken for him.

And the Void Domain is not in danger now, and his children and wives don't need it.

However, the final transaction price of this innate primordial treasure was very exaggerated, reaching 420,000 ancient coins.

Next, a variety of treasures were auctioned, among which there were even treasures no less than a million augu coins.

"The next auction item is the Eternal Immortal Heart Fruit, which can heal all the injuries of the Eternal Dao Realm, and even the fatal injuries caused by the Eternal Dao Realm, with a starting price of 1.2 million ancient coins!"

Seeing this auction item, Luo Wushuang was excited, this was exactly what she needed.

With this Eternal Immortal Heart Fruit, she could heal her maternal grandfather Xinghai.

Thereupon.

She participated in the auction.

"1,300,000 Agu coins!"

"1,500,000 Agu coins!"

"180 Akoko!"

Gradually, this Eternal Immortal Heart Fruit gradually soared to nearly 3 million ancient coins.

"2,960,000 augocoins!"

Luo Wushuang shouted.

At this point, no one continued to bid.

In the end, the Eternal Immortal Heart Fruit fell into Luo Wushuang's hands.

Seeing this, Luo Wushuang finally breathed a sigh of relief.

However, the Eternal Immortal Heart Fruit may not be able to completely heal the wounds of the Torture Sea, and if she could, she would like to bid on similar items again.

Soon.

Ye Tian's auction items, high-level Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, were presented.

"Next is a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, with a starting price of 2 million Ancient Coins!"

The auctioneer said.

As soon as they heard that it was a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, many Eternal Supreme Dao powerhouses were moved!

You must know that in the ancient kingdom, many Eternal Dao powerhouses who comprehended the rules of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao actually did not rely on the items of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao rules, but relied on various treasures and endless long years to comprehend them little by little.

If you can obtain high-quality Eternal Void Supreme Dao Rule items, you can easily comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!

In other words, a high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item can create an Eternal Supreme Dao late-stage powerhouse!

Many forces are willing to pay such a large price to bid for one!

As a result, representatives of the forces of one side and one side, or some incomparably wealthy Eternal Daohua mid-stage powerhouses, all participated in the auction.

3 million!

4 million!

5 million!

In the end, an Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse directly bid 8 million ancient coins to bid for this high-quality Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.
